title: Update TOFU, trust model, and key binding sections in spec/06-security.md for 02xx/Yggdrasil single-key model
description: Revise sections 8.7 Key Management, TOFU baseline (8.7.1), BR-Provisioned, DANE/PKIX to consistently reference unified Ed25519 derivation binding key to both IID and 02xx address. Remove any ULA/GUA mentions. Ensure emphasis on single key for all purposes (signatures, OSCORE via EDHOC/X25519, addressing). Cross-reference 04-network.md and test/vectors/yggdrasil-derivation.json.
